summary: A compact rectangular bunker or fortified structure with a stepped pyramidal roof. The building features a brick and stone foundation, white concrete trim, and a dark wood or nether brick roof with multiple stepped layers. The structure sits on a raised platform with dirt foundation and is symmetrical along its central axis.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramidal roof
shape.symmetry: bilateral symmetry along length and width axes

rebuild_hints: Build a rectangular foundation 10×12 blocks using dirt
Create a white concrete platform/trim layer around the perimeter
Construct main walls using red brick with stone brick accents
Add a horizontal white concrete band at mid-height
Build stepped pyramidal roof using dark wood or nether brick, with 3-4 descending layers
Ensure symmetry on all four sides
Top roof layer should be approximately 6×8 blocks, stepping inward by 1 block per layer
uncertainties: Exact roof material: appears to be dark wood planks or nether brick, difficult to distinguish
Precise window/opening locations on interior faces not fully visible
Exact height of each roof step layer
Whether interior is hollow or solid
Exact stone brick placement pattern within brick walls
